response: CodeVedX offers virtual internship programs in AI/ML, Web Dev, and Data Science. You can apply at codevedx.com/internship. Applications are open throughout the year.
Certificates are awarded upon successful completion of all assigned projects and tasks. You will receive a digital certificate via email within 7 working days.
Most internship programs at CodeVedX are free of cost. Some premium courses may have a nominal fee. Check codevedx.com for current pricing.
Internship programs typically run for 4 to 8 weeks depending on the track. Each project has its own timeline mentioned in the task document.
You can reach CodeVedX at contact@codevedx.in or visit www.codevedx.in. For urgent queries, join the Telegram group.
All project submissions must be pushed to a GitHub repository named CODEVEDX. Share the GitHub link in the task submission form.
Share your project demos on LinkedIn, tag @CodeVedX, and use #codevedx to showcase your work and build your professional profile.
Submit your work using the official Google Form shared via email. Include your GitHub link and LinkedIn demo video link.
